mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_TYPE = '4' AND PRS_AUTH = 'ST'
AND PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_AD_LOG A
INNER JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID WHERE B.PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
SELECT PRS_COUNTRY AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS VALUE FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_TYPE = '4' GROUP BY PRS_COUNTRY

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%m월') AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS VALUE FROM WH_AD_LOG A
INNER JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID
WHERE A.CREATED_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
AND B.PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m'), DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%m월') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.MEM_ID) FROM WH_AD_LOG A
INNER JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID
WHERE A.CREATED_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND B.PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}

SELECT PRS_ID, PRS_NAME, PRS_AUTH, PRS_TYPE, APP_ID, PRS_USE_YN, PRS_COUNTRY FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID} AND PRS_PWD = CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{PRS_PWD}))))) AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_PRESS ( PRS_ID, PRS_PWD, PRS_NAME, PRS_COUNTRY, PRS_TYPE, PRS_AUTH, PRS_USE_YN, APP_ID, PRS_CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{PRS_ID}, CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{PRS_PWD}))))), #{PRS_NAME}, #{PRS_COUNTRY}, '1', 'LC', 'Y', #{PRS_ID}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(PRS_ID, 6) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID LIKE 'star_%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_PRESS ( PRS_ID, PRS_PWD, PRS_NAME, PRS_COUNTRY, PRS_TYPE, PRS_AUTH, PRS_USE_YN, APP_ID, PRS_CREATE_DATE, IS_STAR ) VALUES ( #{PRS_ID}, CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{PRS_PWD}))))), #{PRS_NAME}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{PRS_COUNTRY}, ''), 'KR'), '4', 'ST', 'Y', #{PRS_ID}, NOW(), 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_COUNTRY = #{country} AND IS_POPULAR = 'Y' AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT A.CON_ID, A.CON_BODY, A.CREATED_DATE, A.IS_PINNED, B.PRS_NAME, B.STORED_FILE_NM as MEM_PICTURE,
-- (기존 하트 서브쿼리들...) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_LIKE WHERE CON_ID = A.CON_ID) AS HEART_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_LIKE WHERE CON_ID = A.CON_ID AND MEM_ID = #{memId}) AS IS_LIKED,
D.THUMB_URL as image, D.MEDIA_URL, D.MEDIA_TYPE FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT A JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID JOIN STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA D ON A.CON_ID = D.CON_ID WHERE A.PRS_ID = #{starId} AND D.SORT_ORDER = 0 ORDER BY A.IS_PINNED DESC, A.CREATED_DATE DESC

SELECT B.PRS_ID, B.PRS_NAME, B.PRS_COUNTRY,
-- 전체 노출 수 COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT,
-- OS별 노출 수 SUM(CASE WHEN A.OS = 'ANDROID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ANDROID_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OS = 'IOS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IOS_CNT
FROM WH_AD_LOG A JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID WHERE A.ACTION = 'IMPRESSION'
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{targetMonth}
AND B.PRS_COUNTRY = #{country}
GROUP BY B.PRS_ID, B.PRS_NAME, B.PRS_COUNTRY ORDER BY TOTAL_CNT DESC
